tags.label: merchant
tags.description: Trades, sources, and transports goods across Gaardia, negotiating deals, haggling prices, and using market knowledge and contacts to turn a profit.

tags.label: home-single
tags.description: A private, standalone residence in Gaardia inhabited by a single person or household rather than a communal or multi-tenant dwelling.

tags.label: home-shared
tags.description: Characters share a residence, pooling resources and responsibilities while exposing them to each other's schedules, secrets, and domestic conflicts.

tags.label: lodging
tags.description: Temporary accommodations across Gaardia — inns, guesthouses, camps, and clandestine safehouses where characters rest, recover, store belongings, and gather local information.

tags.label: workplace-tavern
tags.description: Employment-focused scenes in a tavern—bartending, serving, cooking, or managing a rowdy public house that doubles as a social hub for rumors, deals, and occasional brawls.

tags.label: workplace-temple
tags.description: A functioning temple that doubles as a workplace where characters carry out sacred duties—conducting rituals, tending relics, guiding pilgrims, and navigating clerical hierarchy and strict liturgical rules.

tags.label: workplace-shop
tags.description: A character works in or runs a retail shop or stall, dealing with customers, inventory, and daily sales operations.

tags.label: workplace-warehouse
tags.description: Large, utilitarian storage hub in Gaardia with loading docks, stacked cargo and night shifts, ripe for logistics work, labor tensions, smuggling, or clandestine encounters.

tags.label: workplace-vessel-controls
tags.description: Skilled and authorized to operate a vessel's control consoles for piloting, navigation, and system monitoring during workplace duties aboard ships or other vehicles.

tags.label: laborer
tags.description: Performs sustained physical work—construction, farming, mining, and hauling—relying on endurance, practical know-how, and improvised problem-solving.
